bullets: Migrated IAM users to AWS IAM Identity Centre, centralising SSO and permission sets across multiple accounts, eliminating static access keys, and implementing TEAM for time-limited production privilege escalation.
Played a pivotal role in delivering the Akamai to CloudFront migration, translating complex multi-environment configurations into reusable Terraform modules.
Built a serverless AI image analysis pipeline (Lambda, Bedrock, SQS, Step Functions) extracting structured metadata from millions of property listing images.
Migrated a full engineering team into a dedicated AWS account — RDS Aurora, ECS frontend, private API Gateways — handing over a fully self-sufficient platform.
Built an automated Veeam for AWS platform to standardise backup appliances across AWS environments.
Introduced Bitbucket Pipelines and a reusable OIDC Terraform module for AWS environment access, improving the team's security footprint.
Led IaC adoption within an operations team using Terraform, Git, and GitHub Actions, replacing manual infrastructure deployments.
Designed and deployed a 1Password SCIM bridge on ECS Fargate to automate group provisioning from Active Directory.
Maintained and enhanced a multi-environment serverless government platform (Lambda, ECS Fargate), covering CI/CD, CloudWatch monitoring, and cross-team support.
Migrated a Windows Server 2003 data centre to a hardened AWS/Windows Server 2016 environment, covering 20,000+ AD users, objects, and group policies.
3rd line support for major global retailers; on-site installation of signage and interactive POS systems.
QA across web, mobile, and interactive platforms.
Part of the engineering team for a full stadium WiFi deployment.
Provided critical support during a major international sporting event.
